## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between GrowthX Labs and Blueprint's portfolio companies for AI-driven growth strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/5a9soPF8CAJHNVq5hXMV1VHazqHKKz3K?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX Labs offers AI-powered content and outbound marketing solutions, with a focus on SEO and lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/5a9soPF8CAJHNVq5hXMV1VHazqHKKz3K?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [Blueprint has 17 growth-stage portfolio companies, many sub-$10M ARR, seeking cost-effective growth strategies](https://fathom.video/share/5a9soPF8CAJHNVq5hXMV1VHazqHKKz3K?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Next steps: Ben to provide details on 2-3 portfolio companies for GrowthX to analyze and propose tailored solutions](https://fathom.video/share/5a9soPF8CAJHNVq5hXMV1VHazqHKKz3K?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Labs Introduction

  - [Founded by Jimmy and Marcel, grown to $4M ARR in 6-7 months](https://fathom.video/share/5a9soPF8CAJHNVq5hXMV1VHazqHKKz3K?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [20-25 clients including major tech companies (Reddit, Ramp)](https://fathom.video/share/5a9soPF8CAJHNVq5hXMV1VHazqHKKz3K?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
  - [Team of 20-30 people, including engineering staff](https://fathom.video/share/5a9soPF8CAJHNVq5hXMV1VHazqHKKz3K?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [Specialize in scaling content production (e.g., 5 to 50 articles/month)](https://fathom.video/share/5a9soPF8CAJHNVq5hXMV1VHazqHKKz3K?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [Bruno recently joined to lead sales efforts](https://fathom.video/share/5a9soPF8CAJHNVq5hXMV1VHazqHKKz3K?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)

### Blueprint's Portfolio and Needs

  - [17 companies, mostly sub-$10M ARR, some pushing $20-40M](https://fathom.video/share/5a9soPF8CAJHNVq5hXMV1VHazqHKKz3K?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Lean teams, often lacking experienced marketing leadership](https://fathom.video/share/5a9soPF8CAJHNVq5hXMV1VHazqHKKz3K?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Seeking cost-effective alternatives to high-salary hires ($250k+)](https://fathom.video/share/5a9soPF8CAJHNVq5hXMV1VHazqHKKz3K?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [Focus on foundational program execution, not major strategy gaps](https://fathom.video/share/5a9soPF8CAJHNVq5hXMV1VHazqHKKz3K?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Interest in AI-driven solutions for SDR automation, content scaling](https://fathom.video/share/5a9soPF8CAJHNVq5hXMV1VHazqHKKz3K?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)

### GrowthX Labs Capabilities

  - [Inbound SEO and content creation powered by AI](https://fathom.video/share/5a9soPF8CAJHNVq5hXMV1VHazqHKKz3K?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [Outbound lead generation and email automation](https://fathom.video/share/5a9soPF8CAJHNVq5hXMV1VHazqHKKz3K?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [Custom AI workflows for content research, creation, and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/5a9soPF8CAJHNVq5hXMV1VHazqHKKz3K?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [Flexible approach based on client needs (e.g., content vs. outbound focus)](https://fathom.video/share/5a9soPF8CAJHNVq5hXMV1VHazqHKKz3K?tab=summary&timestamp=1256.0)
  - [Experience with both early-stage (e.g., Knapsack) and public companies (e.g., Reddit)](https://fathom.video/share/5a9soPF8CAJHNVq5hXMV1VHazqHKKz3K?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)

### Case Studies and Results

  - [Knapsack: 0 to 1000 visitors in Q4, 11 demo requests from 10k emails](https://fathom.video/share/5a9soPF8CAJHNVq5hXMV1VHazqHKKz3K?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Reddit: Scaled content production, replacing human-only agency](https://fathom.video/share/5a9soPF8CAJHNVq5hXMV1VHazqHKKz3K?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)
  - [Demonstrated ability to validate GTM channels quickly for early-stage companies](https://fathom.video/share/5a9soPF8CAJHNVq5hXMV1VHazqHKKz3K?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)

### Pricing and Packages

  - [Content workstream: $9k/month for 50,000 words of editorial content](https://fathom.video/share/5a9soPF8CAJHNVq5hXMV1VHazqHKKz3K?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
  - [SEO workstream: $12k/month for 1200 pages/year (100 pages/month)](https://fathom.video/share/5a9soPF8CAJHNVq5hXMV1VHazqHKKz3K?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)
  - [Custom packages available based on specific needs and scale](https://fathom.video/share/5a9soPF8CAJHNVq5hXMV1VHazqHKKz3K?tab=summary&timestamp=1581.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Ben to email details on 2-3 portfolio companies for initial analysis](https://fathom.video/share/5a9soPF8CAJHNVq5hXMV1VHazqHKKz3K?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)
  - [GrowthX to study the companies and prepare tailored suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/5a9soPF8CAJHNVq5hXMV1VHazqHKKz3K?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up call with portfolio company representatives to discuss tactical plans](https://fathom.video/share/5a9soPF8CAJHNVq5hXMV1VHazqHKKz3K?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)
  - [GrowthX to add Ben to Slack for ongoing communication](https://fathom.video/share/5a9soPF8CAJHNVq5hXMV1VHazqHKKz3K?tab=summary&timestamp=1752.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare 30/60/90 day expectations for potential engagements](https://fathom.video/share/5a9soPF8CAJHNVq5hXMV1VHazqHKKz3K?tab=summary&timestamp=1695.0)
